module.name: no-placeholder-implementation
module.description: Disallow placeholder, stub, TODO, and not implemented production code.

scenarios.name: should allow meaningful nullable branches and exempt test files
scenarios.given: code with real logic that may return null or placeholder text inside an exempt test file
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function body

scenarios.name: should report placeholder throws, returns, and console calls
scenarios.given: production code containing TODO throws, single-statement empty returns, or console placeholder messages

scenarios.name: should report placeholder comments when enabled
scenarios.given: production source comments containing TODO, FIXME, stub, placeholder, temporary, hack, or not implemented
